title: Vivi Searches for the Shooter
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on vivi searches for the shooter, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Searches for the Shooter. Luffy comes back for another fight with Crocodile, now armed with the will to keep standing. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It was me, Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All the things you rebels thought were the King's evil-doings,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: were actually traps set up by my organization. These past two years... have been most amusing,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Watching both you rebels and the royalties desperately dance about on the palm of my hand...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: It would have been far better for you,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: to die without finding out the truth, however! Kuhahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't listen to him!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: King Cobra...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: There's something only you can do right now...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Go out there and save even just one more life from this needless bloodshed if you can!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: in less... than half an hour,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The Palace square will be blown to smither- eens!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Oh, still alive, are you?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NOO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Vivi...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What're you doing!? Get off of me!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The palace square's going to become a battlefield soon and if it's really going to be blown up, then I-

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: You can't let it BECOME a battlefield!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're still not thinking straight!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you just go out there and tell the soldiers that the palace square will be blown up,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then there'll truly be a pandemonium! Everyone will be too panicked to listen!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can't stop the war nor save anyone that way!

summary: This part develops vivi searches for the shooter and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
